mapper.select: SELECT a.admin_id, a.login_id, a.password, a.name, a.role, a.store_id, s.store_name, a.status, a.last_login_at, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM tb_admin a LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON a.store_id = s.store_id WHERE a.login_id = #{loginId} AND a.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_admin SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
